task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EMR dashboard is visible with an indicator showing the 'admin' user is logged in (e.g., top right corner or sidebar).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the scheduling or calendar section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A calendar or daily schedule interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the schedule view is set to Dr. James Carter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, tab, or header in the calendar view explicitly shows 'Dr. James Carter' or 'James Carter' as the selected provider.

task_completion.description: Verify the event start and end times are correctly set for today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An event creation modal or form is open, showing the current date, a start time of 1:00 PM (13:00), and an end time of 2:00 PM (14:00).

task_completion.description: Verify the event is a non-patient block with the correct reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event creation form shows the reason field filled with 'Staff Meeting' and indicates it is a schedule block or non-patient event rather than a patient appointment.

task_completion.description: Verify the schedule block was successfully saved and appears on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view shows a blocked time slot on the current date from 1:00 PM to 2:00 PM for Dr. James Carter, labeled with 'Staff Meeting'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the EMR web interface, not a terminal executing database or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine NOSH EMR system, not a text editor, notes app, or static HTML mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the final calendar block appears genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The calendar block should match the styling, alignment, and fonts of the rest of the application, with no signs of browser developer tools being used to fake the visual output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target provider is 'Dr. James Carter' (provider_id=2). The schedule block must be on the current date, starting at 13:00 (1:00 PM) and ending at 14:00 (2:00 PM). The reason for the block must be exactly 'Staff Meeting'. The system timezone is America/New_York.
